title: Improve dashboard customization. Especially when using the "share board"
excerpt: The “share” interface should be improved, so that it can be customized, change background colors, customize cells, colors, bold, something that can make sharing more intuitive and customizable for each user. Many times I…

posts.author: JFantini (Jorge Fantini Varela)
posts.cookedHtml: The “share” interface should be improved, so that it can be customized, change background colors, customize cells, colors, bold, something that can make sharing more intuitive and customizable for each user. Many times I have shared works on large screens, where the text honestly does not fit the dimensions, it cannot be seen well because the background is white and I cannot make the letters bold, etc.
